## Summary

What changed?

## Why

What user confusion, failure, or outdated detail does this fix?

## Scope

- [ ] Copy/clarity fix only
- [ ] Broken link or outdated command
- [ ] Code sample fix
- [ ] New content
- [ ] Structure or navigation change

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm run check:links`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I did not run the full build, and I explained why

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay attention to?
